description: CompositionDark navy blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline that has blue tape detailing on the inseam and slightly distressed graphic print with flock detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print If you love to spread happiness wherever you go by giving some hardcore tickles, then this round neck t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the Mr. Tickle graphic with the flock print detailing will make everyone around you laugh. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders- "
